must_haves: 4-6 years experience in fashion buying/merchandising/category management
Experience managing suppliers in India and Asia
Familiarity with SAP/ERP for PO and inventory
nice_to_haves: Category launch or new market entry projects
Experience with WIP trackers and production calendars
hidden_expectations: Ability to work under pressure in fast-paced fashion cycles
Data-driven decision-making on markdowns and replenishment
day_one_deliverables: Seasonal assortment strategy and OTB plan for women's jersey
disqualifiers: No vendor or supplier management experience
